titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/220

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=491 status=live modified=2021-04-07 07:54:21.533754+00 | translation moa=492 status=live modified=2021-04-07 07:54:23.087785+00

div.p:
Omnibus Hoc scriptum visuris uel Audituris . Philippus De Pethcox salutem . Nouerit vniuersitas uestra quod quia
Decem Acras terre In Beleside quas Dedi Monachis De Melros . et Ph’ . filius meus Eisdem Confirmauit . In longum
iuxta terram suam De Edmundist’ a bele . usque in Drituede . impediente quadam Conuentione Inter me et Rogerum .
de Merlay facta tempore Donationis extendere non potui  ego et Ph. filius meus pro nobis et heredibus nostris fide inter
posita votum vouimus . quod finito termino Decem annorum si ante facere non possumus . eisdem Monachis . predictas
decem acras terre sicut iacet propinquius terre de Edmundist’ in longitudinem de Drituede usque in Bele . sine omni dubitacione extendi faciemus . Et vt hoc presens votum nostrum firmum sit et stabile  hoc scriptum sigilli
mei et sigilli filii mei apposicione et Roborauimus .

p.cl: To all that shall see or hear this text, Philip of Pitcox sends greeting.

Let your whole community know that because I could not extend the ten acres of land in Bielside which I have given to the monks of Melrose, and Philip my son has confirmed to the same, in length near their own land of Edmunistoun from Biel as far as Drituede, a certain agreement made at the time of the donation between me and Roger de Merlay being in the way: I and Philip my son for ourselves and our heirs have made with faith the vow, that if we have not been able do it after a period of ten years, we shall without any doubt cause the aforesaid ten acres of land, as it lies close to the land of Edmundistoun alongside the Drituede as fas as the Biel, to be extended to the monks.
And that this our present vow be firm and established, we have reinforced this text by the application of my seal and the seal of my son.
